reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark reviewable-artifact claims satisfied only when the shipped readable-view scope is defined by a projection matrix and backed by executable renderer tests.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names a cross-workflow packet-first artifact contract that should be protected by deterministic renderer and packet-generation tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the reviewable artifact projection matrix and renderer tests: shipped Cautilus-owned readable views are generated from declared packet or source artifacts, with the machine-readable source kept as the audit source.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep the projection matrix and renderer tests current when adding a new Cautilus-owned readable artifact family.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names view truth-source boundaries that should be protected by deterministic renderer and server tests rather than human interpretation.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the projection matrix plus status-report, browser-review, and HTML renderer tests: listed Markdown and HTML views derive from declared packet/source artifacts and do not become a separate truth source.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep the projection matrix and readable-view source-boundary tests current when adding Markdown or HTML projections.
